judge.reason: Primary purpose is to initialize V4L2 controls for the AR0521 sensor, not to manage reference counts. The refcount operations (v4l2_ctrl_handler_init and v4l2_ctrl_handler_free on error) are incidental to the main task of creating and configuring controls.
